headline: How Q1 Earnings Beat And European Asset Sale At LyondellBasell (LYB) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: LyondellBasell Industries recently completed the sale of selected European olefins and polyolefins assets to AEQUITA and reported Q1 2026 earnings of US$0.49 per share, exceeding analyst expectations and marking a 48% year-over-year increase. These results, alongside sharply higher Q2 earnings estimates and a top Zacks ranking, highlight rising confidence in the company’s efforts to reshape its portfolio and earnings base. We’ll now examine how the stronger-than-expected earnings and...

headline: Zacks.com featured highlights include LyondellBasell, Star Bulk, Cenovus and Nexa Resources
summary: LYB, SBLK, CVE and NEXA are highlighted for high earnings yields, rising estimates and growth prospects in an uncertain market.
